name: Nile Egyptian School (NES) - Qena
description: NES Qena brings the prestige of the national Nile Egyptian Schools network to Upper Egypt, offering a world-class education with modern facilities.

name: Egyptian Japanese School - Qena
description: Part of the Egypt-Japan Education Partnership, this school in Qena adopts the Japanese Tokkatsu system to develop well-rounded, disciplined students.

name: Qena STEM School
description: Qena STEM School is a specialized, research-focused school for Egypt's brightest minds, emphasizing science, technology, and innovation.

name: Qena Official Language School
description: An official government language school delivering high-quality bilingual education to students across Qena governorate.

name: Safwa Private School Qena
description: Safwa Private School in Qena provides a safe, nurturing environment with a quality national curriculum for students of all grades.

name: Omar Ibn Abd El-Aziz Private Schools
description: Named after the renowned Umayyad Caliph, this school upholds justice and excellence in education with a values-centered national curriculum.

name: Ajyal Al-Mustaqbal Private School
description: Ajyal Al-Mustaqbal invests in future generations, offering a comprehensive education that prepares students for a rapidly changing world.

name: Futures Language School Qena
description: Futures Language School in Qena combines a strong bilingual program with modern teaching to produce well-prepared, globally-aware graduates.

name: Sidi Omar Language School
description: Sidi Omar Language School is a trusted community school in Qena, known for its dedicated teachers and commitment to student success.

name: German Language School (New Qena)
description: The German Language School in New Qena offers an authentic German education leading to the Abitur, fostering a love for language and culture.
